content:wysiwyg_basic:2:2.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:2:2.html:
Each year over 1,000 youth participate in The Salvation Army of Wake County Athletics Programs, learning the importance of team play and good sportsmanship. Always maintaining a Christ-centered atmosphere, there are pre-game devotions and prayers for each sport. Here, children are taught that winning means having fun, learning fundamental skills, and being a part of a team where they make a difference. For more information contact our Youth Programs at 919-832-6918.

Directions

content:wysiwyg_basic:32:66.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:32:66.html:
Soccer

Registration is now open!

  • All coaches, assistants, and players must register. The cost is $157 per player
  • Registration will close on July 17, 2026 @11:59 PM
  • 10-week program from August 3, 2026, through October 6, 2026
  • All leagues are for boys and girls
    • 4-year-old league
    • 5-6-year-old league
    • 7-8-year-old league
    • 9-11-year-old league
  • All coaches, assistants, and players must register
  • Shin guards and cleats are required
  • Practices will start the week of August 3, 2026 (scheduled on weekdays based on coach availability)
  • Games will start the week of August 24, 2026
  • A Christ-centered atmosphere is maintained in our pre-game devotions and prayers for each sport

During registration, there is an opportunity to make a donation to the Hurley Raynor Community Fund, which helps provide scholarships to deserving youth and helps us maintain our facility. This fund honors Coach Hurley Raynor, who has coached two generations of community center families.

Coach Registration Player Registration

content:wysiwyg_basic:14:13.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:14:13.html:
"Nooners" Adult Basketball

Often referred to as the "Nooners", adults will gather at The Salvation Army's Community Center to play pick-up games. There is no official league - just fun fellowship & basketball. Please know that we will have to close the gym from time to time due to special events going on in the gym. We will try to give you advanced notice when those events occur.

Overview

  • Registration is required
  • January 5 - December 13, 2025
  • Monday, Wednesday, and Friday 11:30 - 1:30 pm
  • Guests are welcome for a one-time fee of $10.00
  • Must be 18+ years of age
  • A Christ-centered atmosphere is maintained in our gym, so please act accordingly

Fees

  • Option 1. Pay $10 each time you come
  • Option 2. Pay $50 for a 12-visit pass (to be used only in 2025)
  • Option 3. Pay $200 for a yearlong pass (good for all of 2025)

Register

content:wysiwyg_basic:21:60.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:21:60.html:
Winter Youth Basketball

Get ready to dribble, shoot, and score with us in an action-packed season of fun and teamwork!

Season dates: January 5, 2026 - March 13, 2026. The cost is $157 per player.

Overview:

  • Coach and player registration is required
  • Coach registration is NOW OPEN
  • Player registration is NOW OPEN   
  • Ages - 5 -14 (boys & girls)
  • Practices start Monday, January 5, 2026
    • Tuesdays (ages 5-6)
    • Wednesdays (ages 7-8)
    • Thursdays (ages 9-11 and 12-14)
    • Fridays (ages 12-14)
  • Games start date: Tuesday, January 26, 2026

A Christ-centered atmosphere is maintained in our pre-game devotions and prayers for each sport.

Coach RegistrationPlayer Register

content:wysiwyg_basic:28:77.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:28:77.html:
Baseball and T-Ball 

Overview

  • Coach and player registration is required
  • March 16 - May 22, 2026
  • Ages 4 - 12 years old (Based on age as of April 1, 2026)
  • All leagues are coed
  • Registration fee is $157 for all participants
    • All payments should be made by credit card at the time of registration
  • A Christ-centered atmosphere is maintained in our pre-game devotions and prayers for each sport.

T-Ball League (4 years of age) :

  • Practices will start on March 16, 2026 (scheduled on weekdays based on coach availability)
  • Games will start the week of April 6, 2026 (scheduled on weekdays based on coach availability)
  • If there aren't enough 4-year-olds for their own league they will play with the 5-6 year-olds.
  • All players will bat from a tee

T-Ball League (5-6 years of age)

  • Practices will start the week of March 16, 2026 (scheduled on weekdays based on coach availability)
  • Games will start the week of April 6, 2026 (scheduled on weekdays based on coach availability)
  • All players will bat from a tee

Coaches Pitch (7-8 years of age)

  • Practices will start the week of March 16, 2026 (scheduled on weekdays based on coach availability)
  • Games will start the week of April 6, 2026 (scheduled on weekdays based on coach availability)
  • Coaches will pitch to their own team

Pitching machine (9-12 years of age)

  • Practices will start the week of March 16, 2026 (scheduled on weekdays based on coach availability)
  • Games will start the week of April 6, 2026 (scheduled on weekdays based on coach availability)

 

Coach Registration Player Registration

content:wysiwyg_basic:38:52.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:38:52.html:
Flag Football

Overview

  • Registration is required for all coaches, assistants, and players
  • Player registration fee is $157
  • This is a seven-week program that runs from October 13 through December 5, 2025
  • Coach registration is now open
  • Player registration is now open
  • Ages: 7-12 (based on child’s age as of October 1, 2025)
    • 7-8-year-old league
    • 9–10-year-old league
    • 11–12-year-old league
    • If we do not have enough participants in each league, we will combine the 7–9-year-olds and 10-12 year-olds
  • Practice dates are from October 13 through October 31, 2025
  • Game dates are from November 3 through December 5, 2025
  • Mouthpiece is required
  • A Christ-centered atmosphere is maintained in our pre-game devotions and prayers for each sport.

Coach Registration Player Registration

content:wysiwyg_basic:57:25.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:57:25.html:
Open Gym

Please note:

Our Open Gym membership gives you unlimited access to pickup basketball and pickleball for the entire month. With your membership, checking in is simple and hassle-free.

  • Memberships are valid only for the month in which they are purchased. ($5 per day for non-members)
  • Renewals are required monthly to continue participation
  • Cost is $38 ($35 Flat rate + $3 PayPal surcharge)

We’re excited to have you join us and hope you enjoy everything our Open Gym program has to offer!

Pickleball: Thursdays 3-6 p.m. (Will add days as participation grows)

Basketball: Monday, Wednesday, Friday 11:30 a.m. - 1:30 p.m.

Registration
